overview: A modern, multi-page personal portfolio website for Doniyor Kamolov — a 12-year-old developer from Uzbekistan. Features world-class neon effects, glassmorphism cards, 4 playable mini-games, dark/light theme, and all content in Uzbek.
features: World-class neon glow effects and glassmorphism
4 playable mini-games in modals (Snake, Memory, Catch Ball, Whack-a-Mole)
Profile image upload saved to localStorage
Coding journey page with syntax-highlighted code
